text:
I made a Brazil World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. That 2002 front line is still the World Cup memory I compare every Brazil attack to.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: Brazil. What are you changing?
text_zh: 围绕巴西的世界杯 2026 预测，主打早期冠军讨论和球迷争论。
safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。

text:
Dark-horse debate for World Cup 2026: Japan.

Japan beating Germany and Spain in 2022 is exactly why nobody should treat them lightly. That does not mean they are winning it, but it does make them dangerous enough to ruin somebody's bracket. Convince me I am wrong.
text_zh: 把日本作为黑马话题抛出来，引导球迷讨论它是否真的有爆冷空间。
safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。

text:
Dark-horse debate for World Cup 2026: USA.

Pulisic's 2022 goal against Iran showed how tense and emotional this team can make a World Cup. That does not mean they are winning it, but it does make them dangerous enough to ruin somebody's bracket. Convince me I am wrong.
text_zh:
世界杯 2026 黑马讨论： USA.

普利西奇 2022 对伊朗的进球，说明这支球队能让世界杯变得多么紧张和情绪化。 这不代表他们会夺冠，但足以说明他们危险到可以毁掉别人的预测表。说服我这个判断是错的。
safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。

text:
World Cup 2026 is still far away, but the group chat is already choosing champions.

What is your early World Cup 2026 take right now?
text_zh:
世界杯 2026 还没开始，朋友群已经开始选冠军了。

你现在对世界杯 2026 最早的判断是什么？
safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。

text:
Every early World Cup prediction should come with one rule: we are allowed to change our minds after the draw.

What is your early World Cup 2026 take right now?
text_zh:
所有早期世界杯预测都应该有一个规则：抽签后可以改主意。

你现在对世界杯 2026 最早的判断是什么？
safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。

text:
There is always one team people ignore in June and suddenly fear by the knockout stage.

What is your early World Cup 2026 take right now?
text_zh:
总有一支球队六月没人聊，到了淘汰赛前大家突然开始担心。

你现在对世界杯 2026 最早的判断是什么？
safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。

text:
The best World Cup watch parties always have one person checking the table every five minutes.

What is the most World Cup-specific habit you suddenly develop every tournament?
text_zh:
最好的世界杯观赛局里，总有人每五分钟查一次积分榜。

每到世界杯，你最容易突然养成什么专属习惯？
safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。

text:
Brazil will not win World Cup 2026. Too much attacking talent, not enough knockout calm. Convince me I am wrong.

Keep it football-only: what part of this take is wrong?
text_zh:
巴西不会赢得世界杯 2026。他们进攻天赋太多，但淘汰赛里的冷静还不够。说服我这个判断是错的。

只讨论足球：这个观点哪部分不对？
safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。

text:
Everyone talks about Argentina repeating. Nobody talks enough about how hard it is to carry that aura into a new cycle.

大家都在聊阿根廷卫冕，但很少有人讨论把冠军气场延续到新周期到底有多难。

只讨论足球：这个观点哪部分不对？

text:
Got excited for World Cup 2026 and started building a small fan hub in my spare time. Mostly schedules, team pages, predictions, and little games for matchday brain.

I am keeping it fan-focused: schedules, team pages, predictions, and simple games rather than anything too serious. Feedback from football people would genuinely help.
text_zh:
因为太期待世界杯 2026，我开始用业余时间做一个小型球迷中心。主要是赛程、球队页、预测和一些比赛日小游戏。

我会保持球迷视角：赛程、球队页、预测和简单小游戏，而不是做得太严肃。真正懂球的人给点反馈会很有帮助。
safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。
